Barrel Sauna UK · Design Proposal

A Bespoke Wellness Commission

This commission is designed to provide a complete wellness space within a single, considered arrangement. Bringing together accommodation, heat and cold in one setting, it creates a retreat that works as a private escape or as a distinctive offering within a hospitality business.

Its integrated design means each element is shaped around the others, so the space functions as one place with a natural flow from one part to the next.

Somewhere to stay, somewhere to unwind, and the space that holds them together.

The Deck

Priced against your site once your deposit is placed.
Interior imagery shown for illustration. Each Rowan is finished to the owner’s specification.
Two ways to live in the same hut

Design Configurations

Both configurations below are built from the identical Rowan shell. The entrance, windows and services stay in the same positions, so either layout can be chosen without structural change. A wood-burning stove, shower room and kitchenette are fitted as standard in each.

Configuration 1: Lounge

Bedroom to the left of the entrance, armchair and coffee-table lounge, kitchenette by the stove, shower room at the far end.

Lifestyle plan
Technical plan · dimensions in mm

Configuration 2: Garden Kitchen

Layout fully reversed: shower room beside the entrance, full-length kitchen run, window-seat dining for four, and the bed at the far end under the gable window.

Lifestyle plan
Technical plan · dimensions in mm
Two design configurations are included with this proposal. Detailed working drawings for your chosen configuration are prepared once your build is secured.
Mobile sauna
On its own trailer

The Mobile Sauna

A four seat barrel sauna built onto its own trailer. It sits on the deck as part of the arrangement, and it moves when you want it to. The barrel measures 2 m in diameter and 1.8 m long.

Four seats
Facing benches sized for four adults.
Glazed end
Full width curved glazing to the entrance end.
Thermowood barrel
Kiln treated staving with stainless banding and a shingled roof.
Trailer mounted
Braked trailer with drawbar. Tow it, site it, move it again.
The cold side

Recovery Tubs

A recovery tub is the other half of a sauna. Heat opens everything up, cold closes it down again, and the contrast between the two is where the benefit sits. Ours run both ways, chilling to one degree and heating to forty, so the same tub serves as a plunge in summer and a hot soak in winter.

  • Chills to 1 °C and heats to 40 °C on the same unit
  • Thermostat with manual temperature control
  • Thermowood tub with drainage
  • Stainless steel fixings and banding
  • Water filter fitted as part of the system
  • Thermo lid, seating and stairs
Two person
The Double Dipper
£5,995 + VAT
Delivered assembled
  • 1360 × 660 mm, 730 mm high
  • Two moulded seats with twin footwells
  • Fibreglass interior
  • Hydro jets available as an addition
Dimensions
  • Overall1360 × 660 mm
  • Height730 mm
  • Internal length1300 mm
  • Seat positions700 mm and 600 mm
  • End radiusR325 mm

Jets can be built into the tub, priced against the finish you choose. Ground preparation and plumbing are worth a conversation before delivery, and we are happy to have it.

Prepared for Chris Hollis
